name: Lamp Effect
description: An elegant lamp/spotlight effect where a cone of light expands from above, illuminating text content with a dramatic reveal animation.
whenToUse: Use for hero sections, headlines, or any section where you want a dramatic spotlight/lamp reveal effect on text.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to illuminate with the lamp effect

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the lamp container
